posts.text:
A how-to (believe) guide for atheists and believers alike. 
thedispatch.com/newsletter/d…

This is bonkers for a bunch of more troubling reasons, but the idea that Cuba isn’t in a hurricane zone was hilarious. I mean I looked it up. 37 since 2000. en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_o….



Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump: Cuba, it's a beautiful island. Great weather. I will be having the honor of taking Cuba. Whether I free it, take it. I think I can do anything I want with it, if you want to know the truth

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2033649730300080291#m

Points for honesty, I guess.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump: They weren't supposed to go after all these other countries in the Middle East. So they hit Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait. Nobody expected that. We were shocked

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2033606083038875863#m

WTH? "Doggy McDoggyface" isn't an option?


Washington Nationals (@Nationals)

WE’RE GETTING A TEAM DOG ... and you’re naming them !!! ⚾️🐶 

vote → nationals.com/teamdog

@Eukanuba | @canineorg





— https://nitter.net/Nationals/status/2033530830757278034#m
“Good morning. It’s Monday. Thumb guy is home! We went to the park. I splashed some puddles! It’s all coming up Pippa! Also, I love you.”
Maybe you’ve stumbled onto a  bunch of conversations about Norse mythology and the god of mischief and are just confused?
“Good morning. It’s Friday. Don’t be frightened by my collar. It’s for scaring away mean dogs. At least that’s what they told me. Also, I love you.”
I forgot I’ve had an account here since 2023. Kicking the tires now.
Giving this a whirl. This is my first Bluesky post and, yes, I'm tweeting pictures of my dogs. Don't say you weren't warned.
